fleet.fleet_a_archetype_id: Fleet A archetype top-level key in archetypes/archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.fleet_b_archetype_id: Fleet B archetype top-level key in archetypes/archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.initial_fleet_aspect_ratio: Initial formation col/row ratio. Example: 2.0 means wider than tall.

visualization.plot_profile: Plot selector: auto | baseline | extended. auto follows the effective cohesion source: v3_test => v3 plots, v2 => v2 plots. Explicit extended is only valid when the effective source is v3_test.

export_video.enabled: Video export switch. false keeps current interactive-only behavior.
export_video.full_plot: true=export full figure layout; false=export Battlefield-only square video (side=height_px).
export_video.output_path: Output video root path or file prefix. Relative paths are resolved from workspace root; runtime appends timestamp automatically.
export_video.fps: Export FPS for encoded video. Independent from simulation tick rate.
export_video.bitrate_kbps: Target bitrate in kbps for encoded video.
export_video.width_px: Output video width in pixels. Default 1920.
export_video.height_px: Output video height in pixels. Default 1080.
export_video.dpi: Render DPI used during animation export. width_px/dpi and height_px/dpi define figure size during export.

visualization.auto_zoom_2d: Auto zoom battlefield view during animation (update every 50 ticks; true/false).
visualization.vector_display_mode: Unit arrow direction mode: effective=post-projection displacement; free=pre-projection composite vector; attack=current attack-target direction (fallback effective if no target); composite=angle-bisector of attack and effective (fallback effective if no target).
visualization.show_attack_target_lines: Visual-only toggle. Draw thin red lines each frame from attacker center (post-tick position) to current target center (post-tick position).
visualization.tick_plots_follow_battlefield_tick: Visual-only toggle. If true, all tick-based plots unfold progressively with Battlefield tick; if false, full trajectories are shown immediately.
visualization.plot_smoothing_ticks: Display-only smoothing window for non-Alive plots. Default 5 ticks. Raw telemetry/export values remain unchanged.
visualization.animation_play_speed: Animation playback speed multiplier. 1.0 is baseline (historical default equals 100ms/frame when interval=100).
visualization.animation_frame_interval_ms: Base animation playback interval per rendered frame in milliseconds (before play-speed multiplier).
visualization.print_tick_summary: Print per-tick summary logs to console.

selectors.movement_model: Runtime movement selector: baseline | v3a | v1. baseline follows current movement baseline; legacy v1 is remapped out of standard test runs.
selectors.cohesion_decision_source: Runtime cohesion decision source selector: baseline | v2 | v3_test. baseline currently resolves to v3_test @ 1.1. test_mode=0/1 remap runtime to the current baseline source; test_mode=2 permits explicit legacy selection.

v3a.centroid_probe_scale: Centroid probe scale in [0.0,1.0]. Effective only when experiment=exp_precontact_centroid_probe.
v3a.odw_posture_bias_enabled: Enable bounded ODW posture-bias prototype inside v3a parallel/lateral pressure redistribution. Default false.
v3a.odw_posture_bias_k: Prototype ODW posture-bias gain. Recommended bounded exploration range: 0.2..0.4. Effective only when odw_posture_bias_enabled=true.
v3a.odw_posture_bias_clip_delta: Single clip half-width around 1.0 for ODW parallel-pressure scaling. 0.2 means clip to [0.8,1.2]; 1.0 means clip to [0.0,2.0]. Effective only when odw_posture_bias_enabled=true.

collapse_signal.v3_connect_radius_multiplier: Semantic connectivity-radius multiplier for runtime source v3_test. Current baseline-confirmed working value is 1.1.
collapse_signal.v3_r_ref_radius_multiplier: Scale-reference multiplier for runtime source v3_test. Keep at 1.0 unless a dedicated semantics review explicitly opens this second-stage variable.

boundary.enabled: Enable boundary soft mechanism master switch. false=soft/hard both OFF. true=soft ON and hard follows hard_enabled.
boundary.soft_strength: Boundary soft-force strength multiplier. 0.0 disables soft push while enabled=true; 1.0 keeps current baseline.
boundary.hard_enabled: Enable hard boundary clamp only when enabled=true. true=hard clamp ON; false=soft-only boundary mode.

movement_low_level.min_unit_spacing: Minimum initial physical spacing and movement separation radius. Recommended default=2.0; density stress mode=1.0.
movement_low_level.alpha_sep: Soft-separation / boundary contribution weight inside movement composition. Current default=0.6. Runtime clamps to >=0.0.

fire_control.fire_quality_alpha: Directional fire-quality coefficient alpha. 0.0 disables directional effect; 0.1 is current recommended default.
fire_control.alpha_safe_max: Documented safe upper bound for fire_quality_alpha: 0.15 (governance note).

contact_model.contact_hysteresis_h: Contact hysteresis band ratio h. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.2]. h<=0 disables CH.
contact_model.fsr_strength: FSR per-tick relaxation strength. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.3]. fsr_strength<=0 disables FSR.

event_bridge.theta_split: Tier-2 Formation Cut bridge threshold on split_separation (Channel-T condition).
event_bridge.theta_env: Tier-2 Pocket Formation bridge threshold on angle_coverage (Channel-T condition).
event_bridge.sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks required for Tier-2 bridge events (both cut/pocket).

collapse_shadow.theta_conn_default: Fallback theta_conn default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_coh_default: Fallback theta_coh default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_force_default: Fallback theta_force default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.theta_attr_default: Fallback theta_attr default for collapse_v2_shadow when quantile threshold cannot be formed.
collapse_shadow.min_conditions: Collapse_v2_shadow pressure condition threshold: minimum true conditions among 4 signals.

report_inference.strategic_inflection_sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks for strategic inflection detection in BRF narrative (HP-size lead).
report_inference.tactical_swing_sustain_ticks: Sustain ticks for tactical swing clustering in BRF narrative (alive lead).
report_inference.tactical_swing_min_amplitude: Minimum absolute alive-lead amplitude for tactical swing clustering.
report_inference.tactical_swing_min_gap_ticks: Minimum tick gap used to merge nearby tactical swing crossings into one cluster.

run_control.display_language: Label language for plot names: 'EN' or 'ZH'.
run_control.max_time_steps: Maximum simulation ticks. If <=0, run until first fleet elimination +10 ticks, capped at 999 ticks.
run_control.random_seed: General visualization seed (non-map). If -1, use true randomness.
run_control.metatype_random_seed: Random seed for metatype generation (Yang exploration commander / sampler). If omitted, falls back to random_seed. If -1, use true randomness.
run_control.test_mode: Execution permission switch. 0/default: baseline runtime only. 1/observe: baseline runtime + observer/event/BRF. 2/test: explicit legacy/experimental runtime selectors permitted.
run_control.metatype_settings_path: Path to metatype generation config (default: archetypes/metatype_settings.json; Yang template + runtime sampling rules; Yang is not a canonical fixed archetype).

battlefield.background_map_seed: Background map seed (stars/planet/asteroid field). If -1, use true randomness.

unit.attack_range: Combat hit range (distance threshold). Phase V governance default is 5.0.
unit.damage_per_tick: Base attack damage per successful hit event.
unit.unit_max_hit_points: Initial and max HP per unit.
